## Methodology & caveats

- **`(full)` = all cases, no dev/test split** — not a full-haystack run. Tune on `dev` and report on `test`; never tune to saturate the benchmark.
- **LongMemEval here is the `oracle` haystack** (evidence-only sessions) — an **upper bound** on retrieval, not the harder full `longmemeval_s` haystack with distractor sessions.
- **QA accuracy is LLM-judged**, answerer ≠ judge (separate local-config models, e.g. an answerer + a distinct reasoning judge) to cut self-grading bias. Not GPT-4-judged, so the absolute numbers are **not directly comparable** to Mem0/Zep-style leaderboards; QA may run on a stratified sample, recall@k covers every labelled question.
- Latency is end-to-end per query (retrieve + answer + grade), p50/p95.
- Each row records its git SHA + config snapshot in `.simba/eval/results.jsonl` (the source of truth this file is derived from).
